name: Efo Riro

ingredients.item: vegetable stock cube Salt to taste
spinach (washed and chopped or left whole)

method: Heat the palm oil in a pot and add the sliced onions and iru. Cook for 2-3 minutes until the onions start to soften. Add the stew base, meat alternatives, stock cube and salt to taste. Cook for 5 minutes over high heat. Add the spinach, stir well to combine and simmer on medium heat for another 5 minutes.
Serve hot with a side of your choice such as steamed rice, eba, pounded yam, boiled plantain, etc.
